name: @tootallnate/bfsar
description: Parser for Nintendo's BFSAR (Binary caFe Sound ARchive) — the master sound archive format used by NintendoWare on Wii U and Switch (3DS sibling: BCSAR; Wii sibling: BRSAR). Provides a directory listing of the archive's named entries (sounds, banks, wave archives, players, groups) and exposes each internal file as a lazy Blob slice.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
